children.text: Once upon a time, a fisherman caught a bottle in his fishing net.
children.cn: 从前，一位渔夫在他的渔网里捕获了一个瓶子。
children.statement: caught 是 catch 的过去式。

children.text: When he opened it, a great cloud came out and became a genie!
children.cn: 当他打开瓶子时，一团巨大的烟云冒了出来，变成了一个妖怪！
children.statement: When 在这里引导时间状语从句。
children.explanation: when 常用作从属连词，意为“当……时”。
children.keywords: opened it, great cloud came out

children.notes: Prepare to die 准备死吧。
children.statement: shouted 是及物动词，后面必须接宾语。
children.explanation: shout 通常是不及物动词，表示大声喊叫。

children.text: 'A long time ago, I made a promise.'
children.cn: '很久以前，我许下了一个诺言。'
children.notes: made a promise 许下诺言。
children.statement: promise 在这里是名词，意为“诺言”。
children.explanation: 在这里作 make 的宾语。

children.text: 'If someone set me free, I would make them rich and powerful.'
children.cn: '如果有人让我获得自由，我会让他们变得富有且强大。'
children.notes: set free 释放；使获得自由。
children.statement: rich 和 powerful 是形容词，在句中作宾语补足语。
children.explanation: make sb. + adj. 意为“使某人变得……”。
children.keywords: set me free, rich and powerful

children.notes: ever 用于否定句，意为'从来'。
children.statement: ever 是副词，用来加强语气。

children.text: 'After years and years of waiting, I became very angry.'
children.cn: '经过年复一年的等待，我变得非常愤怒。'
children.notes: years and years of waiting 年复一年的等待。
children.statement: became 是 become 的过去分词。
children.explanation: became 是 become 的过去式，过去分词是 become。

children.text: 'If anyone set me free, I would kill them instead of giving them anything.'
children.cn: '如果有人让我获得自由，我会杀掉他们，而不是给他们任何东西。'
children.statement: giving 是 give 的动名词形式，接在介词 of 之后。
children.explanation: 介词后面通常接名词或动名词。

children.statement: must 是情态动词，后面接动词原形。
